title: Yimomoyi 3 in 1 Play Color Dough Kitchen Creations Set, Play Color Dough Set for Kids, Ice Cream Noodle Hamburger Maker Machine, Deluxe Dough Tools Kit for Kids 3 years+(12 Colors Dough+Aprons)
features: 【Dough Set with Sleeves and Aprons】The play color dough sets include pasta machine, ice cream maker, burger machine play set, clay dough shapes such as animals, food, and various geometric shapes. And clay dough tools such as children's dough cutters, rolling pins, cutters, extruders, play color dough scissors and wheel cutters. The 56-piece Dough Tools accessories set includes 12 cans of color dough, 2 sets of sleeves and aprons, a complete Dough set, no need to purchase additional accessories!

【High Quality】Each Color Dough accessory is made of safe and high quality plastic, a material that is very sturdy and colorful, non-toxic. Color dough is made of edible wheat flour, non-greasy, non-sticky, can be used repeatedly, 100% safe. Kids will love it!

【Kids Clay Dough Set】The clay dough tools have bright colors, different shapes and are perfect for little hands. Clay molds easily into any shape. Offer cutting, shaping, pressing, molding and rolling tools for children, make endless creations at home or school.

【Improves Creativity】Color dough set have bright colors and come in different shapes, perfect for children to encourage their creativity. Children have access to cutting, shaping, pressing, molding and rolling tools to create endless creations at home or at school and have fun with all their friends.

【Perfect Gift】A good beginners set of play color dough tools with exquisite gift box packaging, ideal gift for fun early learning. Develop children's practical skills, suitable for birthday gifts, Christmas gifts, Halloween, parties, festivals, schools. Perfect for kids who love playing chef and getting creative with clay tools. The varieties are rich and colorful and stimulate the imagination and creativity of countless children.
description: Product Description 3 in 1 Play Color Dough Kitchen Creations Set Color Dough Tools accessories consist of 56 accessories, includes 12 cans of Color Dough, 2 sets of sleeves and aprons(It prevents children from getting play color dough on their clothes.), and a plastic table runner, etc. Previous page Next page Deluxe Dough Tools Kit - Our Color Dough Play Sets for Kids is perfect for birthday gifts, classroom activities, gift exchanges, school, parties, Christmas, Halloween, Easter and everyday events Children's Modelling Clay Set with Tool Accessories 36PCS Ice Cream Play Dough Set 56PCS Play Color Dough Set 24 Tins Modelling Clay Set Package included The 36-piece modelling clay accessory set contains 12 tins of modelling clay Package included The 56-piece modelling clay accessory set contains 12 tins of modelling clay Package included 24pack Playdough Set In 24 Colours Sleeves and aprons 1 set of sleeves and aprons Sleeves and aprons 2 sets of sleeves and aprons Sleeves and aprons Not included
